_meta.purpose: Per-model quant ladder (VRAM for the weights) + architecture (for KV-cache math). Single source of truth — selection logic reads this, never hardcodes model names. VRAM seeded from the plan (docs/LOCAL_QUANTIZATION_AND_MODEL_ORCHESTRATION_PLAN.md §2.6/§3.2); 'measured' entries are overwritten by scripts/benchmark_models.py from real /api/ps numbers and tagged with measured_from.

fields.quants: ordered map {quant: weights_vram_mb}; benchmarker overwrites with measured values
fields.arch: {n_layers, n_kv_heads, head_dim} for the KV-cache formula (vram_budget.plan). Defaults applied when omitted.
fields.default_ctx: typical context window the model is run at
fields.measured: true once a benchmark replaced the seed numbers
fields.measured_from: source of the VRAM number for the recorded quant(s)

qwythos:q4.measured_from: ollama list size 6.8GB (Qwythos-9B-Claude-Mythos Q4_K_M, the installed main model); arch is a 9B seed estimate — benchmark_models.py overwrites measured VRAM from /api/ps

llama3.2:latest.measured_from: plan seed (§3.2); benchmark_models.py overwrites measured quant in state/model_benchmarks.json

gemma3:4b-it-qat.measured_from: plan seed (§3.2 QAT int4); not yet pulled on this box

gemma3:12b-it-qat.measured_from: plan seed (§3.2 QAT int4 — offload + low ctx on 8GB)

gemma4:e4b-it-qat.measured_from: plan seed (§2.6 research: Gemma 4 E4B Q4_0 ~4.5GB); NOT yet pulled — preferred execution model once installed

qwen2.5-coder:7b.measured_from: plan seed (§3.2); not pulled on this box
